docs show working claude-code + codex registration lines
description: Generator emitting .well-known/mcp/server-card.json (name, description, tools, transport, repo URL) per the MCP Server Card shape; docs/MCP_SERVER.md documents install (claude mcp add / codex mcp), tool table, and security posture (read-only tools vs install-release which writes).
title: Server Card + MCP docs

acceptance_criteria: server starts on stdio and lists 8 tools
brick-search returns fixture bricks with trust fields
description: New tools/mcp/server.mjs using @modelcontextprotocol/sdk (optionalDependency, lazy import — repo stays zero-dep unless MCP is used): stdio transport, registers every tool module in tools/mcp/tools/*.mjs (each exports {name, description, inputSchema, handler}). Handlers call existing lib functions directly (adoption-utils/state for search+doctor, sma-store install for release-install) — never shell out to CLIs. npm script mcp:serve. Config: SMA_ROOT env as everywhere.
title: MCP server scaffold (stdio) over the registry

acceptance_criteria: the named failure mode has a test that fails before the fix and passes after
description: release-install writes files from a release artifact into a target project: canonicalize + reject .. traversal, absolute paths, and symlink targets outside the target root; add attack-fixture tests (dot-dot entry, abs path, symlink out). [P8.5 skeptic finding, 2026-07-10 round 1]
title: Harden MCP release-install against path and symlink escapes
